summary: Hedge surfaced 2 evidence-linked risk(s) using deterministic analysis. Model reasoning was skipped because no API key was supplied.

findings.title: New mutating entry point has no detected authentication control
findings.precondition: The route is deployed and reachable without an upstream authentication control.
findings.potentialImpact: An unauthenticated actor may invoke a state-changing operation.
missingControls: Authorization scoped to the target resource
findings.securityInvariant: Only authenticated and authorized principals may invoke POST /api/files/upload.

suggestedTest.title: Regression witness for POST /api/files/upload
suggestedTest.purpose: Only authenticated and authorized principals may invoke POST /api/files/upload.

findings.remediationPrompt:
Remediate this evidence-backed Hedge finding: New mutating entry point has no detected authentication control.
Security invariant: Only authenticated and authorized principals may invoke POST /api/files/upload.
Entry point: POST /api/files/upload
Missing controls: Verified authentication, Authorization scoped to the target resource.
Make the smallest focused change, add a regression witness that fails on the vulnerable revision and passes after the fix, preserve legitimate behavior, run the relevant tests, and explain residual uncertainty.

findings.title: New storage write crosses a trust boundary without complete upload controls
findings.asset: Object storage and downstream file processors
findings.attackerCapability: Submit attacker-controlled content to the new entry point
findings.precondition: User-controlled content reaches the storage operation.
findings.potentialImpact: Unexpected content, oversized payloads, or cross-tenant object writes may reach privileged storage.
findings.securityInvariant: Uploaded content must be authenticated, tenant-scoped, type-checked, and bounded before storage.

suggestedTest.title: Regression witness for POST /api/files/upload
suggestedTest.purpose: Uploaded content must be authenticated, tenant-scoped, type-checked, and bounded before storage.

findings.remediationPrompt:
Remediate this evidence-backed Hedge finding: New storage write crosses a trust boundary without complete upload controls.
Security invariant: Uploaded content must be authenticated, tenant-scoped, type-checked, and bounded before storage.
Entry point: POST /api/files/upload
Missing controls: Verified authentication, Payload or file size limit, Object ownership constraint.
Make the smallest focused change, add a regression witness that fails on the vulnerable revision and passes after the fix, preserve legitimate behavior, run the relevant tests, and explain residual uncertainty.

notes: Offline analysis mode: repository content was parsed as data and no model call was made.

limitations: GPT-5.6 architectural interpretation was not run.
